metadata.title: Dua Lipa at the Met Gala — History in the Making
metadata.description: Dua Lipa's portrayal of Rue Bennett in Euphoria is one of the greatest performances in television history. The rawness, the vulnerability, the pain — she brought something real to every single scene. From the season 1 finale carousel breakdown to the season 2 episode 'Stand Still Like the Hummingbird,' she left us speechless. At 24 years old, she became the youngest two-time Emmy winner for Best Lead Actress in a Drama Series.
